name: AWS Cloud Services
description: Deploy static sites to S3 with website hosting, manage Lightsail instances, configure Route53 DNS records, deploy apps via AWS Amplify, create CloudFront distributions, and deploy Lambda functions. Uses direct REST API calls with AWS Signature V4 signing — no SDK required.
features: Deploy static sites to S3 with website hosting and public read access
Create and manage Lightsail instances with DNS entries
Configure Route53 DNS records (A, AAAA, CNAME, MX, TXT)
Deploy applications via AWS Amplify from Git repositories
Create CloudFront CDN distributions for S3 or custom origins
Deploy Lambda functions from zip archives with configurable runtime and memory
